info.name: ECommerce API
info.description: Complete API collection for ECommerce platform with Authentication, Products, Cart, Orders, Payments (Stripe), Coupons, Banners, and Webhooks. See /postman/STRIPE_TESTING_GUIDE.md for payment testing workflow and /postman/BANNERS_ENDPOINTS.md for banners management.

query.description: Sort field: name, price, createdat, rating (default: id)
Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)
Sort field: name, price, createdat, rating
Sort field: name, price, createdat, rating
Search term (searches product name and description)
Search term (returns products that CONTAIN this term)

response.name: Success
response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Recommendations retrieved","data":["Premium T-Shirt","Classic Shirt","Shirt Dress","Shirt Set","Shirt Combo"]}

request.description: Get best-selling products ordered by sales volume

response.name: Success
response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Best selling products fetched successfully","data":{"items":[{"id":1,"name":"Best Seller T-Shirt","description":"All time favorite","price":29.99,"categoryId":1,"brandId":1,"hasVariants":true,"isFavorite":false},{"id":2,"name":"Popular Polo","description":"Customer favorite","price":34.99,"categoryId":1,"brandId":1,"hasVariants":false,"isFavorite":true}],"totalItems":2,"page":1,"pageSize":10}}

query.description: Search term (searches category name and description)
Search term (returns categories that CONTAIN this term)
Search term (searches brand name and description)
Search term (returns brands that CONTAIN this term)

request.description: Get all banners with pagination (Admin only)
Get active banners for display (No authentication required)
Get banner by ID (No authentication required)

body.raw:
{
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/banners/summer-sale.jpg",
  "isActive": true,
  "title": "Summer Sale 2026",
  "description": "50% off on all summer collection",
  "link": "https://example.com/summer-sale",
  "displayOrder": 0
}

request.description: Update a banner (Admin only) - All fields are optional
This endpoint receives webhooks from Stripe. In production, use Stripe CLI for local testing: stripe listen --forward-to https://localhost:7286/api/webhooks/stripe
